message:
test(unit): expand wezterm.rs inline tests (56→126) (wa-1u90p.7.1)

+70 new tests covering previously untested pure functions and edge cases:
- tail_text: zero lines, empty, no trailing newline, single line, exact count
- stable_hash: empty/deterministic/distinct/single-byte
- ms_u64: duration conversion
- is_retryable_error: all variants (NotRunning/Timeout/CommandFailed/PaneNotFound/CliNotFound/CircuitOpen/non-wezterm)
- parse_pane_id: valid/whitespace/empty/zero/max/invalid
- categorize_io_error: catch-all variant
- CwdInfo: whitespace trimming, host-only, nested remote, default
- WaitMatcher: substring/regex matches, description, empty needle
- WaitOptions: default value assertions
- WaitResult: PartialEq, Debug
- CodexSummaryMarkers: complete() all combinations, Copy/Eq
- PaneSize: default, serde roundtrip
- CursorVisibility: default, serde roundtrip
- SplitDirection/MoveDirection: Debug/Clone/Copy/Eq
- WeztermClient: retries clamping, Default trait, circuit status
- PaneInfo: serde roundtrip, effective_title default, empty domain_name, size precedence, parsed_cwd None
- mock_wezterm_handle/mock_wezterm_handle_failing: direct coverage
- WeztermHandleSource: delegation
- PaneWaiter: max_polls limiting
- CodexSummaryWaitResult: Debug/Clone/Eq
- control: single-byte length assertions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
